## make fast-ci Results
**Exit Code:** 2 (failure)
### Passed Checks: - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired (19 files checked, 0 violations) - Lint: All checks passed - Format Check: 1727 files already formatted - Prettier Check: All matched files use Prettier code style - Markdown Check: OK - Exec Reference Check: OK (.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date) - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit Tests (erk): 6010 passed - Unit Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed - Unit Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed - Unit Tests (erk-mcp): 28 passed
### Failed Test: **File:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/cli/commands/land/test_render_land_script.py`
**Test Name:** `test_render_land_execution_script_bakes_in_static_flags`
**Line:** 97
**Assertion Error:** ``` assert '--plan-number=100' in script ```
The test expects `--plan-number=100` to be in the rendered script, but instead found `--linked-pr-number=100`. The script is generating `--linked-pr-number=100` where the test expects `--plan-number=100`.
**Context:** The test is checking that static flags are baked into the land execution script at generation time. The parameter was renamed from `plan_number` to `linked-pr-number` in the actual implementation, but the test assertion still expects the old flag name.
